# viettelidc_vks_scheduler (Resource)

Provides a VKS Scheduler resource to manage block storage backup schedules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Cáº¥u hÃ¬nh Backup Scheduler cho Volume Block Storage
resource "viettelidc_vks_scheduler" "block_backup_scheduler" {
  name        = "uc5-block-backup-schedule-3"
  start_time  = "2026-07-01 02:00:00"
  finish_time = "2026-07-02 06:00:00"
  cycle       = 86400
  unit        = "day"
  quantity    = 1
  cluster_id  = 1477
  volume_ids  = [255]
  host_id     = 6
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (Number) ID of the K8s cluster where the block storage volumes belong.
- `cycle` (Number) Cycle interval in seconds (e.g. 86400 for 1 day). Must correspond to the `unit`.
- `finish_time` (String) Finish time of the schedule, formatted exactly as `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss`. Must be after `start_time`.
- `name` (String) The name of the backup schedule.
- `quantity` (Number) Number of backup records to retain before older ones are rotated out.
- `start_time` (String) Start time of the schedule, formatted exactly as `YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss`. Must be in the future.
- `unit` (String) Unit of interval. Supported values: `day`, `hour`, `week`.
- `volume_ids` (List of Number) List of block storage volume IDs to backup. These volumes must be attached to the cluster.

### Optional

- `host_id` (Number) ID of the host. If not set, inherits from provider config.
- `plan_type` (String) Plan type, default is `k8s`. Leave it empty to use default.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the backup scheduler.
- `status` (String) Current status of the backup schedule (e.g., `ACTIVE`).
